gnomad.note: low-frequency synonymous variant observed in population databases

insilico.note: synonymous variant; missense predictors not applicable; CADD approximate

mavedb_function.note: BRCA1 RING-region synonymous change; score approximate

literature.title: Accurate classification of BRCA1 variants with saturation genome editing.
literature.abstract: Findlay et al. showed that many synonymous BRCA1 RING-domain edits behave like wild type in saturation genome editing.
